title: Wrong result produced when left joining information_schema tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.users (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE test_db.orders (order_id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Decimal(10, 2), PRIMARY KEY (order_id));
INSERT INTO test_db.orders (order_id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.00), (2, 1, 150.50);
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM test_db.users u LEFT JOIN test_db.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Left joining information_schema tables produces wrong results
